faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about technical SEO audits and optimization services in Massachusetts.

items.question: What does a technical SEO audit include?
items.answer: A technical SEO audit reviews crawlability, indexing, site architecture, page speed, mobile usability, structured data, canonicalization, redirects, and other factors that affect organic search performance.

items.question: How long does a technical SEO audit take?
items.answer: Most audits take one to two weeks, depending on the size of the website, its technology, and the complexity of the issues discovered.

items.question: Do you implement the technical SEO recommendations?
items.answer: Yes. We can work with your development team or implement approved technical fixes directly, depending on your website and project requirements.

items.question: Can technical SEO improve local visibility in Massachusetts?
items.answer: Technical SEO creates a strong foundation for search visibility. It works best alongside relevant content, authority building, and ongoing SEO strategy.
